data.title: JOYSTAR Pluto 12 14 16 18 20 Inch Kids Bike with Light Up Training Wheels, Kids' Bicycle for Boys Girls Age 3-12 Years, Child

features: DESIGN FOR KIDS - 1.This kids bike comes with flash training wheel

basket and water bottle for early rider. 2.Quick release seat simplify the height adjustment. 3.Saddle with holder to learn riding when the training wheel is off. 4. Foot brake and handbrake easy to provide phenomenal stopping power when needed.
DIY DECAL & SAFE CHAIN GURAD - Your child will get a DIY decal
they could make a unique bike with the decal by sticking their name on the frame or chain guard. The chain guard well protects the chain
it will last longer than other bikes
your child will not get hurt when try to touch the chain.
EASY TO ASSEMBLE - The children bike comes with 85% Pre-assembled body and the basic assembly tools
normally takes a novice about 20 minutes to assemble it. If you have problem about assembly or the bike
RECOMMENDED SIZE CHART - 12" BIKE FOR 3-4 YEARS (33"-41") TODDLER
18" bike for 5-9 years (43"-59") boys & girls 20Inch bike for 7-12 years. Note: child height may vary even at the same age
please take the height into consideration.
ALWAYS RELIABLE - JOYSTAR bike complies with the CPSC standards
and Made of premium steel to survive the bumps of learning
the durable steel frame is backed by our limited lifetime warranty. Customers will be provided with 24 hours service when contacting JOYSTAR for any queries.

relatedProducts.Title: Glerc Fantacy Kids Bike, 12-20 Inch Children Bicycle for 2-13 Years Old Boys Girls, Kids Bicycle with Water Bottle Holder & H
relatedProducts.Features: 【Ready for Adventure】This kids bike features a water bottle holder and a safety LED light, perfect for outdoor adventures, keeping your child visible and hydrated. | 【Easy Braking】The Children bike is equipped with a coaster brake and a handbrake, which provides an intuitive braking experience for beginners, while also helping to develop advanced braking skills in a safe system. | 【Friendly Design】This kids bike features an adjustable seat and handlebars, easily adapting to your child's growth, ensuring a comfortable riding position and experience for years. | 【Size Guide】 This 14 inch bike is suitable for children ages 3-5, 35"-43" tall, with an inseam height of 15"-19". The bike weighs 23 lbs. Please focus on your child's height and inseam to choose the size. | 【85% Pre-Assembled】The main parts of the kids bicycle are pre-assembled, and the final assembly can be completed in just 20 minutes using basic tools, allowing your children to get started quickly.

relatedProducts.Title: vollsch BMX Style 12 14 16 Inch Kids Bike Training Wheels 20'' Bicycle with Kickstand for 2-14 Years Old Toddlers Boys Girls
relatedProducts.Features: Intended for Kids: Our BMX style toddlers bike caters specifically to novice riders embarking on their cycling journey. It features safety training wheels for balance (while the 20-inch bicycle only has a kickstand), along with an adjustable seat to accommodate your child's development | Superior Quality: Crafted from high carbon steel, the bike frame is designed to withstand the rigors of uneven terrain without bending or breaking, offering essential safety for your child's adventures. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure minimal maintenance needs | Safety and Sturdiness: The trusty coaster brake is perfect for toddlers who might not have the muscle power for hand brakes yet. The full chain guard keeps little fingers safe from getting caught in the chain. And those big 12 x 2.4-inch tires give a great grip to stop any slipping while they're riding | Easy Installation: The bike arrives with 85% of the assembly already completed, accompanied by essential assembly tools. By following our installation guide video and instructions, you will only need to attach a few components, which should take roughly 20 minutes to finish the final assembly process | Ensure Proper Fit: The 12-inch bike fits children 32 - 38 inches tall, aged 1 - 4 years. The 14-inch is ideal for kids 35 - 43 inches, aged 3 - 5 years. The 16-inch bike is designed for children 40 - 51 inches tall, suitable for ages 4 - 8 years. The 20-inch fits big kids 48 - 60 inches tall, aged over 8 years

Sections.Title: Watch your little ones' confidence soar as they ride VOLLSCH kids bicycles.
Texts: 12 inch: 10.6kg (23 lb) 14 inch: 11.8kg (26 lb) 16 inch: 12.9kg (28 lb) 20 inch: 13.8kg (30 lb)

Vollsch bikes are designed to ignite a sense of wonder and curiosity in young minds. Our bicycles are crafted with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring that each one is as unique as the child who rides it.
